name: Dried Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over dried apples and let soak for 3 to 4 hours.
2. Add sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Stir well.
3. Fit half of pastry into a 9-inch pie pan and pour apple mixture into this.
4. Dot with butter or margarine cut into bits.
5. Cover with remaining rolled-out pastry.
6. Bake for 45 minutes in a 350°F oven.
7. Makes one 9-inch pie.
